conservative.name: Perfect Gift
conservative.requirements: A few hours of shopping in a commercial district of the target's social tier. You spend 5 coins of the target's social tier, then present the gift to the target

success.description: You find an appropriate gift, one that will certainly endear you to the target. You influence the target
As above, and you and the target recover 1 stress - truly, giving is its own reward!

boon.description: It's the thought that counts, and your thought shows. Gain to your next Social action against the target

sigmarsComet.description: You find the perfect gift, but it exceeds your budget. You may spend another 5 coins; if you do, you influence the target again and gain on your next attempt to influence the target

reckless.name: Perfect Gift
reckless.requirements: A few hours of shopping in the commercial district of the target's social tier. You spend 5 coins of the target's social tier, then present the gift to the target

success.description: You find an appropriate gift, one that will certainly endear you to the target. You influence the target

boon.description: It's the thought that counts, and your thought shows. Gain to your next Social action against the target

bane.description: You match the target's tastes perfectly... and get him something he already has. Gain to your next Social action against the target

sigmarsComet.description: What luck! Your thoughtful generosity is observed by more than just the target; you may influence a second target of the GM's choice
